title: nvm: NvmMetadata access/flags fields undocumented
description: In src/nvm.rs, NvmMetadata fields access and flags are raw u16 with no doc comments. nvm_write also takes access and flags as u16 parameters with no guidance. A contributor has no idea what bit definitions are valid or where to look (wolfHSM wh_Nvm.h defines WH_NVM_ACCESS_* and WH_NVM_FLAGS_* constants). Add doc comments pointing to the wolfHSM constants or at minimum explaining the fields are opaque bitmasks passed through to the server.
